implementationGroups.title: Verification and evidence policy
requiredBehaviors: Verify the phase's implemented behavior with focused tests, manual/emulator evidence, or explicit verificationEvidence.
riskHints: target tests only count as strong evidence when backed by latest test gate PASS or explicit harness blocker
build pass alone does not close per-feature behavior
manual review evidence must point to concrete target endpoints
acceptanceEvidence: Update source-coverage-matrix.json after implementation with targetEndpoints, tests, parityLevel, and verificationEvidence.
If tests cannot run, record the concrete harness blocker instead of claiming test PASS.

matchedGroups.title: Profile page and logout flow
requiredBehaviors: Logout navigates back to onboarding/root unauthenticated path.
Placeholder profile cards remain represented or explicitly documented as product placeholders.
riskHints: Source profile data is mostly static; avoid inventing edit/profile backend behavior.
acceptanceEvidence: manual review or runtime smoke if available
uiContracts: profile summary, profile cards, logout button

matchedGroups.title: Capability resolution and focused verification
requiredBehaviors: Close capability rows with direct API, platform replacement, fallback, or deferred evidence as appropriate.
Replace template example tests with focused behavior coverage.
riskHints: Several capability rows are probably static-analysis false positives and should be narrowed by source override rather than bulk deferred.
acceptanceEvidence: documented capability evidence in implementation sessions
dataContracts: target-side test coverage for startup/session/repository/detail state behaviors

coordinationNotes: Prefer extending existing route/navigation/state surfaces over creating parallel shells.
If a shared surface must change, keep the change minimal and update only evidence rows tied to this group.
